name: Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Amazon sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, discrepancies cause cash flow gaps. We automate reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation of invoices and purchase orders.
problem_solved: Discrepancies between vendor invoices and purchase orders
features: Weekly email reports of reconciled invoices
Manual entry option for unmatched invoices

locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual reconciliation of invoices and purchase orders
must_have_features: Weekly email reports of reconciled invoices
